# BLACKBOX AI for VS Code

## Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Blackbox. All Agents in One.

Blackbox unifies every major AI agent into one powerful platform. One subscription. One workflow. Unlimited possibilities. Join +30M builders on BLACKBOX.

---

- **All agents, one place:** Run Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Goose, OpenCode, and 15+ coding agents from a single interface — no tab switching, no separate subscriptions
- **Judge layer picks the best result:** Dispatch your task to every agent simultaneously. BLACKBOX evaluates every output and selects the highest-quality implementation automatically
- **Autonomous end-to-end execution:** The agent reads your codebase, writes code, runs terminal commands, reads the output, and self-corrects until it ships working software
- **300+ models:** Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-5.4, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Minimax-M2.5, Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, and more — all accessible from one extension
- **15+ coding agents:** Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Goose, OpenCode, and more — orchestrated together or run head-to-head
- **Orchestration:** Multiple agents work concurrently on different parts of your codebase — one writes, another reviews, another optimizes — results merged automatically
- **Browser Tool:** The agent launches a real browser, navigates your app, clicks elements, captures screenshots, and verifies its own implementation in real time
- **Blackbox Skills:** Reusable, shareable expert workflows packaged as Skills — version-controlled in your repo, invoked autonomously by the agent
- **Controllable autonomy:** Granular per-operation approval controls for file edits, file creation, command execution, and file reads
- **Free. No credit card.** Connect your BLACKBOX AI account and start coding in under 30 seconds

---

## WHAT IS BLACKBOX AI?

Every major AI lab is building its own coding agent. Claude Code. Codex. Gemini. Goose. OpenCode. Each one powerful. Each one isolated. Each requiring its own subscription and workflow.

BLACKBOX AI is the orchestration layer that brings them all together. Not another agent — **the platform that makes all agents better.**

Run every agent on the same task simultaneously. A judge layer evaluates every output and selects the best result. Or design sequential pipelines where agents collaborate step-by-step — one writes, another reviews, another optimizes. The result: software shipped faster, cheaper, and at 10X the quality of any single agent alone.

---

## ORCHESTRATION

[![](https://storage.googleapis.com/workspace-0f70711f-8b4e-4d94-86f1-2a93ccde5887/intro-demo.gif)]()

Dispatch your task to Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Goose, OpenCode, and BLACKBOX simultaneously. Each agent implements it differently. The judge layer evaluates every result and selects the best implementation for you. You get the output of every major agent for the effort of 1 prompt.

---

## FILE SELECTION

[![](https://storage.googleapis.com/workspace-0f70711f-8b4e-4d94-86f1-2a93ccde5887/file-selection.png)]()

Add files, folders, Git commits, web URLs, and screenshots directly into your conversation. BLACKBOX AI understands your entire project — not just the file you have open.

---

## MODEL SELECTION

[![](https://storage.googleapis.com/workspace-0f70711f-8b4e-4d94-86f1-2a93ccde5887/model-selection.png)]()

Switch between 300+ models in one click. Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-5.4, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Minimax-M2.5, Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5 — use the right model for every job, or let the judge layer decide.

---

## RUN COMMANDS

[![](https://storage.googleapis.com/workspace-0f70711f-8b4e-4d94-86f1-2a93ccde5887/run-command.png)]()

Most AI tools stop at generating code. BLACKBOX AI runs it. Terminal commands, build scripts, test suites, package installs — the agent executes, reads the output, and self-corrects until it works.

---

## MCP SERVERS

[![](https://storage.googleapis.com/workspace-0f70711f-8b4e-4d94-86f1-2a93ccde5887/mcp.png)]()

BLACKBOX AI supports the Model Context Protocol (MCP) — connect any tool, database, API, or service to the agent. Your stack. Your rules.

---

## GET STARTED

1. Install the extension — search "BLACKBOX AI" in the VS Code Extensions view (`Ctrl+Shift+X`) or click Install above
2. Find the AI Agent icon on the right side of VS Code after installation
3. Connect your BLACKBOX AI account — click the AI Agent icon and sign in
4. Start coding — give tasks to the agent for new or existing projects
5. Customize your workspace — drag the chat panel anywhere in VS Code

No API key required. No credit card.

---
